title: Dalek Mod - Control Menu
description: DMCM (Dalek Mod Control Menu) is a client-side addon for the Dalek Mod that allows users to automatically input coordinates into the TARDIS control panel.
body:
# `Dalek Mod - Control Menu`

`Dalek Mod - Control Menu` is a client-side addon for the Dalek Mod for Minecraft. It allows players to easily input coordinates into their TARDIS coordinate panel with just a few clicks, making it quick and convenient to navigate through time and space.

With `Dalek Mod - Control Menu`, users can specify the X, Y, and Z coordinates of their destination and have them automatically entered into the TARDIS coordinate panel.

If you're using the Dalek Mod and want to make navigating through time and space easier, DMCM is the perfect addon for you.

### Requires: [Dalek Mod [Forge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-dalek-mod)
